snippet.title: Chhor Denge: Parampara Tandon | Sachet-Parampara | Nora Fatehi, Ehan Bhat | Arvindr K, Bhushan Kumar
snippet.description:
Gulshan Kumar & T-Series presents Bhushan Kumar's "Chhor Denge", a brand new song in the voice of “Parampara Tandon" featuring Nora Fatehi & Ehan Bhat. The lyrics of new song are penned by Yogesh Dubey &  music composed by Sachet-Parampara. The video is directed by Arvindr Khaira.

♪Stream the Full Song Here♪

snippet.title: Uppena Telugu Movie Trailer | Panja Vaisshnav Tej | Krithi Shetty | Vijay Sethupathi | Buchi Babu
snippet.description:
Uppena Telugu Movie Trailer on Mythri Movie Makers. #Uppena Latest 2021 Telugu Movie ft. Panja Vaisshnav Tej, Vijay Sethupathi and Krithi Shetty. Written & Directed by Buchi Babu Sana. Music by DSP / Devi Sri Prasad. Presented by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y Ravi Shankar under Mythri Movie Makers & Sukumar Writings banners.

Uppena Trailer is officially released by Young Tiger NTR.

The tale of an incredible love, Uppena movie is all set for a Grand Release in theaters on February 12th, 2021.

#PanjaVaisshnavTej #VijaySethupathi #KrithiShetty #UppenaTrailer #BuchiBabuSana #DSP #DeviSriPrasad #MythriMovieMakers

snippet.title: Pre Teaser of Radhe Shyam | Prabhas | Pooja Hegde | Radha Krishna Kumar | Glimpse on February 14th
snippet.description:
Pre Teaser Of Radhe Shyam On UV Creations. Radhe Shyam is an upcoming Indian romantic drama film starring Rebel Star Prabhas and Pooja Hegde. Written and directed by Radha Krishna Kumar. Music by Justin Prabhakaran on T-Series, Sound design by Resul Pookutty. The film is presented by Krishnam Raju under Gopi Krishna Movies and produced by UV Creations and T-Series jointly. Movie is Shot simultaneously in Telugu, Tamil and Hindi. Also starring Sachin Khedekar, Priyadarsi Pulikonda, Bhagyashree, Murli Sharma, Kunaal Roy Kapoor, Riddhi Kumar, Sasha Chettri, Sathyan and many others. Cinematography  Manoj Paramahamsa. Music Theme by Mithoon. Art Director Ravinder.

A Glimpse on February 14th. Save the Date.

#PreTeaserOfRadheShyam #Prabhas #PoojaHegde #RadhaKrishnaKumar #UVCreations #TSeries #Prabhas20 #RadheShyamTeaser #RadheShyamMotionPoster


Movie Details:

Cast: Prabhas, Pooja Hegde, Sachin Khedekar, Priyadarsi Pulikonda, Bhagyashree, Murli Sharma, Kunaal Roy Kapoor, Riddhi Kumar, Sasha Chettri, Sathyan and many others.

Written and Directed: Radha Krishna Kumar

Produced by  UV Creations and T-Series 

Presented By Krishnam Raju under Gopi Krishna Movies

Music Director: Justin Prabhakaran on T-Series

Sound design: Resul Pookutty

Cinematography:  Manoj Paramahamsa

Music Theme: Mithoon

Art Director: Ravinder

Music by Justin Prabhakaran on T-Series, Sound design by Resul Pookutty. The film is presented by Krishnam Raju under Gopi Krishna Movies and produced by UV Creations and T-Series jointly. Movie is Shot simultaneously in Telugu, Tamil and Hindi. Also starring Sachin Khedekar, Priyadarsi Pulikonda, Bhagyashree, Murli Sharma, Kunaal Roy Kapoor, Riddhi Kumar, Sasha Chettri, Sathyan and many others. Cinematography  Manoj Paramahamsa. Music Theme by Mithoon. Art Director Ravinder.

A Glimpse on February 14th. Save the Date.

snippet.description:

http://gethap.pn/Iw5k
--
For Business Enquiries : jumpcuts16@gmail.com
___________________________________

Have you had a savage ghost video or ghost in the house? Jump Cuts presents a video of “Ghost Scenario.” 

That creepy 2 am call from Ramesh has raised too many questions in his friend’s mind. He goes to the terrace to meet Ramesh, but alas! There’s no one. 

Suddenly, he sees Ramesh standing there. His body shivered with fear. Ramesh kept his hand on his friend’s shoulder and was about to tell a secret. Just when he opened his mouth, the phone rang. It’s Ramesh’s mother’s call. He learns from Ramesh’s mother that Ramesh is dead.

Why did Ramesh call his friend to the terrace? What secret does he want to say? 

If Ramesh is dead, who was calling? Find out in “Ghost Scenario” - a scary short video. Stay tuned to Jump Cuts for the full video.

#Ghostscenario #ghostinhouse #Jumpcuts
___________________________________

snippet.title: Smartness doesn't come through books. How to learn Emotional Intelligence: Dr. Vikas Divyakirti.
snippet.description:
प्रिय व्यूअर्स, 

Interesting Moments की इस सीरीज़ में हम डॉ. विकास दिव्यकीर्ति सर की हिंदी साहित्य, एथिक्स और निबंध की क्लासेज की छोटी -छोटी वीडियो क्लिप्स साझा कर रहे हैं। इन वीडियोज़ से आप यह सीख पाएंगे कि कैसे कठिन से कठिन बातों को भी आसानी से सीखा जा सकता है। सर के पढ़ाने का रोचक तरीका सहज ही विषय के प्रति रुचि जगा देता है। जब आप इनसे गुजरेंगे तो इस बात को महसूस कर सकेंगे। इसमें मोटिवेशन, हास्य विनोद तथा जीवन से जुड़ी कुछ महत्त्वपूर्ण बातें होती हैं।

यह वीडियो क्लिप डॉ. विकास दिव्यकीर्ति सर की एथिक्स क्लास की है। इस वीडियो के माध्यम से आप यह समझ पाएंगे कि सीखने के अलग-अलग तरीकों में कौन-सा बेहतर है? आमतौर पर हम किताबों से ही जीवन की हर सीख प्राप्त कर लेना चाहते हैं, लेकिन व्यावहारिक रूप से ऐसा संभव नहीं होता। एक सीमा के बाद सीखने की यह पद्धति काम नहीं आती। इस वीडियो में सर इसी विषय पर चर्चा कर रहे हैं कि बेहतर व्यक्तित्व के लिये सीखने की प्रक्रिया को किस प्रकार साधा जाना चाहिये। प्रसिद्ध मनोवैज्ञानिक डेनियल गोलमेन के सिद्धांत को सर रोचक उदाहरण के माध्यम से बता रहे हैं।

#ShortVideos #VikasSir #InterestingMoments

=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵

𝐎𝐧𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐞 𝐅𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐝𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐂𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐬𝐞 (𝐏𝐫𝐞𝐥𝐢𝐦𝐬 + 𝐌𝐚𝐢𝐧𝐬) 𝐏𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐌𝐨𝐝𝐞:

👉 For 𝐟𝐞𝐞, 𝐀𝐝𝐦𝐢𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧 and 𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐝𝐞𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐥𝐬 of this course download the 𝐃𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐡𝐭𝐢 𝐋𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐀𝐩𝐩 from this link: https://bit.ly/3bqTzjH

👉 To know the 𝐝𝐞𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐥𝐬 𝐨𝐫 𝐭𝐨 𝐫𝐞𝐠𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐫 through our website click on this link: https://bit.ly/2JF1cJx

=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵
𝐏𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐂𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐬𝐞𝐬 (𝐇𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐢 𝐋𝐢𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐈𝐀𝐒 𝐏𝐫𝐞𝐥𝐢𝐦𝐬):

👉 For 𝐟𝐞𝐞, 𝐀𝐝𝐦𝐢𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧 and 𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐝𝐞𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐥𝐬 of 𝐏𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐂𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐬𝐞 (Hindi Literature and IAS Prelims): http://bit.ly/2vGNj72

👉 𝐃𝐞𝐦𝐨 𝐜𝐥𝐚𝐬𝐬 playlist- http://bit.ly/2qyY1cW

𝐅𝐨𝐫 𝐕𝐢𝐝𝐞𝐨 𝐮𝐩𝐝𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐬 𝐟𝐨𝐥𝐥𝐨𝐰 𝐮𝐬 𝐚𝐭 -------

snippet.description:
Presenting RiRi (Rihanna) full audio song performed by DILJIT DOSANJH 
SUBSCRIBE to channel ► https://bit.ly/diljitdosanjhchannel
 #DiljitDosanjh

Song: RiRi
Singer: Diljit Dosanjh
Lyricist - Raj Ranjodh 
Music - Intense

Lyrics Translation:-

Oh Beautiful One of Barbados, 
Your skin tone golden as though born of wheat.
Raj (lyricist) salutes the Almighty, 
Who set this Angelic Beauty on Earth.

I'll gift you a special Patiala Style Outfit,
I'll buy you Anklets, I'm Crazy for you.
Oh Rihanna
Oh Rihanna

You have big wide eyes, 
you are a true treasure of Beauty
I'll be at your Concert, wearing a Kurta Pajama
Oh Rihanna
Oh Rihanna

Oh the things your eyes do to us,
You have Punjabi Fans crazy for you, Ms. Fenty Beauty
The Breadth of your Fan Base makes the haters burn with jealousy
In the middle of the night, tossed them haters into trolley

The world is in a Trance behind your sway
Oh Rihanna, Oh Rihanna
Try on this Punjabi Outfit i had sewn for you from Moga, Oh Rihanna
I'll be at your concert wearing Kurta Pajama
Oh Rihanna
Oh Rihanna
Oh Rihanna
Oh Rihanna

snippet.title: The Girl On The Train | Official Trailer | Parineeti Chopra, Aditi Rao Hydari & Kirti Kulhari
snippet.description:
The journey has begun and there's no turning back. Are you in?

A bright city, a dull morning and a curious girl on the train. When a voyeuristic divorcee fixates on the lives of a perfect couple from afar, she soon gets embroiled in a murder mystery that unfolds revealing truths about her own life. Get on board a thrilling experience with Parineeti Chopra, Aditi Rao Hydari, Kirti Kulhari and Avinash Tiwary. Catch Ribhu Dasgupta's The Girl On The Train on 26th February, only on Netflix.

snippet.title: We are a 'Dry State' | Comedy | Dreamz Unlimited
snippet.description:
Nagaland Liquor Total Prohibition (NLTP) Act, 1989 was passed on Nagaland Legislative Assembly in 1989. Those who support alcohol prohibition point at the dangers of drinking, the lives it has destroyed and the misery caused. They no doubt have a point, but some countered that alcohol consumption should be regulated in public interest, and not totally prohibited.
Nevertheless, Nagaland became a ‘dry state’ and instead of drinking legally, people started drinking ‘illegally.’
The inflow of liquor into the dry state has since remained regular and adequate for the consumers over the last 31 years and hundreds of people are arrested every year for “contravention of the provision” of the Act.
This video is a satire take on the subject.

Concept & Production
Dreamz Unlimited Team

Follow us on Instagram

localized.title: We are a 'Dry State' | Comedy | Dreamz Unlimited
localized.description:
Nagaland Liquor Total Prohibition (NLTP) Act, 1989 was passed on Nagaland Legislative Assembly in 1989. Those who support alcohol prohibition point at the dangers of drinking, the lives it has destroyed and the misery caused. They no doubt have a point, but some countered that alcohol consumption should be regulated in public interest, and not totally prohibited.
Nevertheless, Nagaland became a ‘dry state’ and instead of drinking legally, people started drinking ‘illegally.’
The inflow of liquor into the dry state has since remained regular and adequate for the consumers over the last 31 years and hundreds of people are arrested every year for “contravention of the provision” of the Act.
This video is a satire take on the subject.

Concept & Production
Dreamz Unlimited Team

Follow us on Instagram 

https://www.instagram.com/dreamzunlim​...

https://www.facebook.com/DreamzUnlimi​...

snippet.title: Ninnila Ninnila | Ashok Selvan | Ritu Varma | Nithya Menen | Zee Studios | 26th Feb
snippet.description:
What happens when Dev, a hefty genius chef with muscle spasms, Tara, his co-worker with OCD and Maya, a happy-go-lucky girl with the mind of a child, cross paths?

Find out in the super entertainer #NinnilaNinnila​​, brewing in a kitchen with a pinch of romance and a handful of comedy!

Releasing worldwide on 26th February in Cinemas and on Premium Video On Demand​​.  🎥✨

Presented by Bapineedu B
Written and Directed by Ani. I. V. Sasi
Produced by BVSN Prasad
DOP - Divakar Mani
Music Director - Rajesh Murugesan
Editing - Navin Nooli 
Trailer Edit - Satyaraj Natarajan 
Art Director - Sri Nagendra Tangala
Dialogues - Naga Chandu, Anusha, Jayanth Panuganti,
Audiography - M R Rajakrishnan
Sound Design - Sync Cinema
UK Producer - Yogesh Sudhakara
PRO - Vamsi Kaka

snippet.title: Gifts That We Really Want This Valentine's Day | The Cheeky DNA
snippet.description:
To order your customized Nua Auto-repeat plan, click here -  https://bit.ly/2MoH5RC 

Order online and get up to 33%off and with my promo code - "SUBHA14" an additional 14% discount on Valentine's Day.

Nua is a new-age brand transforming the women’s wellness space, starting with its innovative sanitary pads - rash-free, leakage-proof, and with individual disposal covers. You also get to make your own pack of 12 pads from 3 sizes (heavy flow, medium flow, and light flow).

With the Nua Auto-repeat Plan, you can choose how many packs you want to be delivered as per your need - monthly, bi-monthly, or once in three months. The packs will directly show up at your doorstep based on your chosen frequency.

___________________________________

#ValentinesDay #thecheekydna #subhalaxmiparida

What is the best valentine's gift to him/her? Watch The Cheeky DNA's new Tamil comedy video.

The Cheeky DNA presents "Gifts That We Really Want This Valentine's Day."

Look how husband and wife duo Abhistu Vignesh and Subhalaxmi Parida celebrate Valentine's Day. This is a special video from The Cheeky DNA to all her followers. Watch and share this Tamil comedy video and make your day special. 

For more Tamil funny videos, the Tamil Youtuber, subscribe to The Cheeky DNA.

The Cheeky DNA wishes you all a happy valentine's day!

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1168 & 1169 | Recap
snippet.description:
After getting into an accident, Virat's mother arrives at the house for help and a group of Soumya's community arrive to bless Kuhu on the celebration of Kuhu's 'Annaprashan' ceremony in the same house. Will Heer end up crossing paths with them and face her past yet again?

#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26KvW8epq68trmgmuFgW1dWBY

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

LYRICS:

Soch, Kitna Maza Ayega,
Jab Hum Tum, Pahaado Ke Shehar Mein Rahenge
Aur Tere Mere Din Bhi Kuch Ghanto Mei Guzrenge
Soch, Kitna Maza Ayega,
Jab Hum Tum Bs Ek He Sadak Pe Chalenge
Hathoon Mein Hath Liye, Bas Baatein Karenge 

Baatein, Kuch Anjaani Si, Kuch Nakli Si, Kuch Diwaani Si, 
Oooo Humpe Ye Samaa Bhi Muskurayega….
Soch, Kitna Mazza Ayega….
Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha, Ha, Ha Ha 
Mazaa Ayega….
Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha, Ha, Ha Ha

Trumpet Music……

Ek Aam Ka Paudha, Jo Bachpan Mein Boya Tha 
Ek Raja Ka Beta, Jo Jungle Mein Khoya Tha…
Ek Aam Ka Paudha, Jo Bachpan Mein Boya Tha
Ek Raja Ka Beta, Jo Jungle Mein Khoya Tha

Oo Teri Ye Sab Baatein, Mujhe Achi Lagti Hai
O Jab Tu Choti Si, Aur Pyari Si,Paanch Saal Ki, Ek Bachhi Lagti Hai 
Ho... Koi Puraan Quissa Tere Chehre Pe, Hansi Layega…
Soch Kitna Maza Ayega….. Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha, Ha, Ha Ha
Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha, Ha, Ha Ha 
Maza Ayega…

Trumpet Music

snippet.title: CLAY POT MUTTON CURRY | Traditional Mutton Recipe Cooking in Village | Mud Pot Mutton Recipes
snippet.description:
Every day, our ancestors used clay pot vessels to cook their food. Today we use a clay pot to cook our favorite mutton curry recipe. 

Clay pot gives the extraordinary smell and aroma of the food. Foods that are cook in clay pots, It's very healthy and tasty as well. We use traditional masalas, Cold-pressed gingelly oil to make the mutton recipe healthy and traditional.

Finally, we enjoy the food, the taste is delicious!!

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah  - तारक मेहता - Ep 2994 - Full Episode - 16th September 2020
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SAB TV Channel : https://www.youtube.com/user/sabtv?sub_confirmation=1
Click to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7ZFhouqhrvP3Sx0U7qxdzJi

Episode 2994:
----------------------
Bhide has a bad dream and believes the dream could turn into reality. Madhavi comes to confront him and gets to know about the dream in which, Bhide is been dragged by the police. The reason behind the dream is Tapu. Watch the full episode




About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant.The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbour. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son pushes Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: Angana Morey | Shreya Ghoshal & Soumyadeep Ghoshal
snippet.description:
Shreya Ghoshal teams up with her talented brother, Soumyadeep Ghoshal to compose and produce this intense yet intricate electronic pop ode to the feeling of longing, titled “Angana Morey”. 
Sung by the inimitable Shreya Ghoshal, Angana Morey, is rooted, earthy and intense. Shreya makes her presence felt through her idiomatic phrasing, penning words that invoke the bittersweet feeling of longing and reunion. Shreya’s lyrics and singing, transport you into a satisfying trance, while Soumyadeep switches to top gear with his intelligent production, fusing electronic layers with the magnanimous Budapest Symphony Orchestra, guitars, tabla and distinguished flute parts that all converge into a dramatic confluence!
The song is Shreya’s contemporary interpretation of the girl longing for her beloved, deeply in love for each other, but away from her. The raag, the composition and the music are encapsulating and transport you like a whirlwind from one universe to another, visually captured by the choreography and life like projections in the video.

Singer, Composer, Lyricist : Shreya Ghoshal
Music Produced by : Soumyadeep Ghoshal
Additional Production, Live Strings Orchestrated by : Samarth Srinivasan
Tabla : Nitin Mitta
Flute : Rajeev Prasanna
Guitars : Soumyadeep Ghoshal
Live Strings : Budapest Art Orchestra
Mixed and Mastered by Aftab Khan at Headroom Studio, Mumbai 
Mix Assistant Vatsal Chevli

Directed by Nazeef Mohammed
Edited by Allan Fernandes 
DOP : Ronnel Parmar
Conceptualisation by Nazeef Mohammed and Allan Fernandes
Motion Graphics Director : Mayur Sharma
3D Artist : Parth Reshamwala
Face Mapping : Prashant Bhikadia
Illustrator : Robin Chakraborty
Graded by Mayur Sharma and Nitesse
Offline Edit by Sagar Parikh
Assistant Editor : Yogesh Chandravanshi
Additional Artwork : Gayathri Sankaran

Choreography : Shakti Mohan 
Assistant Choreography : Somya Kautia, NrityaShakti
Dancers : Mukta Nagpal and Parth Sethi , NrityaShakti 

Production Team : Parth Shah, Renish Kotodia, Rohan Shetty, Deep Dave and Meher Singh
Project Coordinators : Smrithi Menon and Khushboo Gugle
Video Conceptualised , Produced and Post Produced at BToS Productions

Distributed by : Believe Digital

Lyrics :-
Aao sajan angana morey
Aao sajan angana morey 
Din rain tumari yaad sataye
Aao sajan angana morey 
Aao sajan angana morey
Aao sajan... Angana Morey.. Angana Morey..

(Music)

Raag preet ka tumne sunaya 
Saat suron mein mohe sajaya 

Tere moh mein aise
Man bheetar mehak rahi hun

Is peedh ko samjho piya 
Haan is peedh ko samjho piya
Jiya ab na maane 

Aao sajan angana morey
Aao sajan angana morey 
Din rain tumari yaad sataye
Aao sajan

(Music)

Aao.. Sajan aao.. aaa..
Sajan laagi.. 
Laagi mohe jog piya.. 
Sajan... 
Aao sajan angana morey..
Aao sajan..

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1167 & 1168 | Recap
snippet.description:
Akshay questions Heer about where she went in the middle of the night, leaving Kuhu alone. Heer apologises to him for her recklessness but claims that she is not liable to answer to him about her whereabouts. How will Akshay react to it?

#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26KvW8epq68trmgmuFgW1dWBY

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: ही एक ग्रेवी बनवुन ठेवा आणि हवं तेव्हा हॉटेलसारखी कोणतीही डिश फक्त 10 मिनिटात बनवा/All purpose gravy
snippet.description:
In this video I will share recipe of restaurant style all purpose gravy, using this gravy you can make many dishes within 10-15 mins and tastes awesome.

या विडियो मध्ये आपण पाहणार आहोत हॉटेल मध्ये वापरली जाणारी ग्रेवी जी वापरून बर्‍याच प्रकारच्या डिश आपण 10-15 मिनिटात बनवू शकतो.. 

Ingredients / साहित्य ( 4 restaurant style dishes / 4 डिश साठी) 

Tomato / टोमॅटो 500gms 
Onion / कांदे 500gms 
Ginger / आले 50gms
Garlic / लसुण 50gms
Pumpkin seeds / मगज बी 50gms
Cadhew / काजू 25-30
Oil / तेल 6-7 tbsp
Bay leaf / तमालपत्र 4-5
Cinnamon / दालचिनी 2 inch
Black cardamom / मसाला वेलची 1
Green cardamom / हिरव्या वेलची 6-7
Cloves / लवंगा 7-8
Cumin seeds / जीरे 1 tbsp
Salt / मीठ 
Corriender powder / धणे पूड 2 tsp
Sugar / साखर 2 tsp
Red chilly powder / लाल मिरची पावडर 1&1/2 tsp
Turmeric / हळद 1 tsp

#allpurposegravy
#hotelsarkhigravy
#ग्रेवीएकसब्जियांअनेक
#ग्रेवीएकभाज्याअनेक 
#gravyeksabjiyaanek
#allpurposegravy
#testaurantstylegravy
#saritaskitchen

Marakkar Lion of the Arabian Sea, Written and Directed By Priyadarshan and Produced By Antony Perumbavoor Under the Banner Aashirvad Cinemas.

Starring Mohanlal, Pranav Mohanlal, Arjun, Suniel Shetty, Prabhu, Manju Warrier, Suhasini,  Keerthi Suresh, Kalyani Priyadarshan, Fazil, Siddique, Nedumudi Venu, Innocent, Ashok Selvan and Others.

Singer : KS Chitra
Music Director : Ronnie Raphael
Lyricist :  Hari Narayanan

snippet.title: નરેન્દ્ર મોદીના ભાઈ પ્રહ્લાદ મોદીએ અમિત શાહના પુત્ર વિશે શું કહ્યું? BBC Exclusive
snippet.description:
#gujarat #localbodyelection #narendramodi #prahladmodi 

ગુજરાતમાં સ્થાનિક સ્વરાજની ચૂંટણીને લઈને તમામ પક્ષોએ તૈયારી શરૂ કરી દીધી છે. 

નરેન્દ્ર મોદીના ભાઈ પ્રહ્લાદ મોદીના પુત્રી સોનલ મોદી આ ચૂંટણીમાં ઉમેદવારી નોંધાવી રહ્યા છે. 

બીબીસી સંવાદદાતા તેજસ વૈદ્યએ પ્રહ્લાદભાઈ સાથે વાત કરી. 

વીડિયો : ઉત્સવ ગજ્જર 

તમે અમારી સાથે જોડાઈ શકો છો :

snippet.title: Ghost Scenario | Promo Video | Jump Cuts 2.0 | Hari & Naresh
snippet.description:
Have you had a savage ghost moment? Jump Cuts presents a promo video of “Ghost Scenario.” 

That creepy 2 am call from Ramesh has raised too many questions in his friend’s mind. He goes to the terrace to meet Ramesh, but alas! There’s no one. Later, he gets a call from Ramesh’s mother that Ramesh is dead.

If Ramesh is dead, who was calling? Find out in “Ghost Scenario.” Stay tuned to Jump Cuts for the full video.

#Ghostscenario #Promo #Jumpcuts

___________________________________

Cast : Hari Baskar
Directed by : Naresh Dillibabu
Music : Surya Srini
Cinematography : Jerin Auxilium
Editor : Vignesh Chakkaravarthy 
DI : Vishal 
Production Manager : Hari Prasad 
Team : Karthik & Vignesh 
Media partner : Divo 

___________________________________

Jump Cuts is a Tamil Entertainment channel by Hari and Naresh. We love telling our stories that we have came across in our life, friends, neighbourhood and bring it to you in our own way through the jump cut editing ✂️.

We are here to entertain and if you like us, do share, like and subscribe

That creepy 2 am call from Ramesh has raised too many questions in his friend’s mind. He goes to the terrace to meet Ramesh, but alas! There’s no one. Later, he gets a call from Ramesh’s mother that Ramesh is dead.

If Ramesh is dead, who was calling? Find out in “Ghost Scenario.” Stay tuned to Jump Cuts for the full video.

#Ghostscenario #Promo #Jumpcuts
